title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-18
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: The greenhouse got counted
gist.blurb: The garden ledger received its daily tending. App health checks and greenhouse numbers are freshly pollinated.
gist.summary: Updated the daily app metrics, health checks, and Greenhouse listings in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have current app activity and health information for keeping the ecosystem garden in view.
gist.visual_concept: Polly acts as a careful garden keeper, checking labeled code-plants in a cozy greenhouse while a small CRT monitor robot reads fresh health metrics from a clipboard. The greenhouse represents the community app directory and its daily status update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink blush, light blue wings, and a tiny gardener hat, checking code-plants in a warm greenhouse while a chunky CRT monitor robot holds a clipboard of green health check marks. Lime green (#ecf874) glows prominently from terminal screens and flower pots among mint, lavender, peach, and warm cream plants; cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
